nasb.text: He waters the mountains from His upper chambers; The earth is satisfied with the fruit of His works.

esv.text: From your lofty abode you water the mountains; the earth is satisfied with the fruit of your work.

cnv.text: 你從自己的樓閣中澆灌群山， 因你所作的事的果效，大地就豐足。

ccb.text: 祂从天上的楼阁降雨在山间， 大地因祂的作为而丰美富饶。

csbs.text: 你从你的楼阁浇灌群山； 因你作工的成果，大地就饱足。
